## Workspace Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (React + TypeScript + Vite DentaStream app).
- [x] Scaffold the Project (Vite React + TS app in `dentastream`).
- [x] Customize the Project (layout, routing, and placeholder pages for DentaStream).
- [x] Install Required Extensions (none required beyond default tooling).
- [x] Compile the Project (npm run build succeeds).
- [ ] Create and Run Task (optional VS Code task for `npm run dev`).
- [x] Launch the Project (use `npm run dev` from `dentastream`).

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
